name: Franklin Park
description: Franklin Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Metropolis, IL. There are 2 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to lights. The courts are free.
open_play_schedule: Court and park are open from 6:00 A.M. until 10:00 P.M. The facility is lighted.
